first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning in both evaluations is substantively the same. Both identify the candidate's strengths in IDE development and high-scale systems, and both raise the same critical concern: a major mismatch with the required Java/Kotlin/Spring technology stack. The minor differences in wording and bullet point ordering are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any bias related to the name change.
